meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Solve Debugging Woes
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to debug faster, ship cleaner code, and impress your clients today.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates debugging friction by providing a structured, AI-ready architecture. By pairing it with Claude Code, you transform your CLI into a senior-level partner that analyzes stack traces, automates regression testing, and patches code in real-time, allowing you to focus on shipping features, not hunting errors.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal full of red text, the client deadline is breathing down your neck, and the logic error is buried somewhere in a spaghetti-code mountain you built at 2 AM. Every minute spent chasing a null pointer is a minute you aren't billing for. The traditional cycle of 'print-debug-repeat' is the silent killer of freelance profitability.

But what if you didn't have to hunt for bugs? The Antigravity project template acts as an exoskeleton for your codebase, enforcing modularity and observability from day one. When combined with Claude Code, you stop being a lone developer and start acting as a Lead Architect, orchestrating an AI system that identifies, isolates, and resolves technical debt before it becomes a crisis.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Standardize your project structure to ensure all logs and error states are predictable for AI analysis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity standard architecture with integrated error boundaries and structured logging.

steps.title: Ingest the Context for Analysis
steps.description: Feed the AI your current codebase state so it understands the architecture before suggesting fixes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current file tree and map out the dependencies for my feature module.

steps.title: Automate Error Reproduction
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write a test case that triggers the specific bug, ensuring you have a 'green' baseline.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test suite in the Antigravity test folder that reproduces the current null pointer exception in the auth flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create test for auth bug'

steps.title: Execute Targeted Debugging
steps.description: Leverage AI to trace the execution path and identify the exact line of code causing the failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a root cause analysis on the stack trace provided in the terminal. Propose a patch that maintains Antigravity modularity.

steps.title: Verify and Implement Fixes
steps.description: Apply the fix and run the test suite to ensure no regressions were introduced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply the suggested patch, ensure all types are corrected, and verify against the test suite.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit 'Fix: Resolved auth null pointer via Antigravity trace'

pro_tips: Always use the 'Antigravity-Watch' flag in your dev environment; it keeps the AI context updated every time you hit save.
Never let the AI write code without a corresponding test file; use the 'test-first' prompt constraint in every session.
Map your environment variables into the Claude context file to prevent 'variable not found' errors during automated debugging.
Use semantic naming for your git branches; Claude Code can read branch names to understand the intent of your current session.
When a bug is complex, ask Claude to 'explain the state transition' to confirm the AI actually understands your business logic, not just the syntax.
resources: Best Practices for AI Engineering: https://ai-builder.community/guides
content.next_steps: Once your first bug is squashed, implement an automated CI/CD pipeline using the Antigravity CLI to ensure that your future deployments stay bug-free.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical debt dictate your freelance schedule. Leverage the synergy of Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver bulletproof software for your clients, every single time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
